name: Hunter
description: A ranged glass cannon with the highest base attack in the roster. Low HP and defense; wins fights fast or not at all.

abilities.name: Precision Shot
abilities.description: A pinpoint arrow that ignores most of the enemy's defense.

abilities.name: Net Trap
abilities.description: Tangle the enemy in netting and take a defensive stance. +3 defense for 2 turns.

abilities.name: Multi Shot
abilities.description: Loose 4 arrows in rapid succession, each with its own RNG roll.
